name: check_ml_frameworks
description: Check available ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, scikit-learn) and their versions.

name: get_ml_module_info
description: Return version, feature flags, and tool inventory of the ML integration module.

name: get_research_module_info
description: Return metadata about the research module capabilities.

name: list_ml_integration_targets
description: Return GNN-compatible ML integration targets and their dependency availability.

name: list_research_topics
description: Return Active Inference and GNN research topic taxonomy.

name: process_ml_integration
description: Process ML integration for GNN files: model training, inference setup, and framework export.

name: process_research
description: Run GNN research processing: generate experiment metadata and cross-references.

name: read_research_results
description: Read and return research output files from a previous research processing run.

name: sympy_analyze_stability
description: Analyze system stability using eigenvalue analysis

name: sympy_cleanup
description: Clean up SymPy MCP integration and reset state

name: sympy_get_latex
description: Convert a mathematical expression to LaTeX format

name: sympy_simplify_expression
description: Simplify a mathematical expression to canonical form

name: sympy_solve_equation
description: Solve an equation algebraically for a specified variable

name: sympy_validate_equation
description: Validate a mathematical equation using SymPy symbolic processing

name: sympy_validate_matrix
description: Validate matrix properties including stochasticity constraints
